# User curated premium video hero skill set - Overview

Visual traits:
- strict grayscale palette
- no colored accents
- white opacity hierarchy
- HSL grayscale tokens
- premium material quality
- Liquid Glass pseudo-rim
- serif accent typography
- single accent punctuation

Use when:
- strict grayscale hero
- minimal cinematic brand page
- luxury AI product
- art and creative platform
- high-end editorial landing page
- restrained Liquid Glass video hero

Avoid when:
- brand requires colorful accents
- data-heavy dashboard
- low-contrast video without overlays
- full-line gradient headline
- random colored glow
- using color as only state indicator

AI summary: Strict grayscale Liquid Glass hero for premium, artistic, restrained landing pages. Uses no colored accents, HSL grayscale tokens, white opacity text hierarchy, pseudo-element glass rim, video atmosphere, serif accent typography, and single accent punctuation instead of full-line gradients.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: strict grayscale hero, minimal cinematic brand page, luxury AI product, art and creative platform, high-end editorial landing page, restrained Liquid Glass video hero
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Use strict grayscale only for restrained premium hero pages.
- Do not introduce purple, cyan, green, orange, or other colored accents.
- Use HSL grayscale tokens such as 0 0% X%.
- Text hierarchy should rely on white opacity: primary text-white, secondary text-white/80, body text-white/60, muted text-white/50.
- Use glass material, typography, layout, video atmosphere, spacing, blur, and pseudo-element rim effects to create premium feel.
- Use one accent punctuation, symbol, word, slash, bracket, cursor, or final period instead of a full gradient headline.

AI summary: Strict grayscale Liquid Glass hero for premium, artistic, restrained landing pages. Uses no colored accents, HSL grayscale tokens, white opacity text hierarchy, pseudo-element glass rim, video atmosphere, serif accent typography, and single accent punctuation instead of full-line gradients.

content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Interaction States

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: strict grayscale hero, minimal cinematic brand page, luxury AI product, art and creative platform, high-end editorial landing page, restrained Liquid Glass video hero
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- CTA hover may use restrained scale-105; active uses scale-95.
- Hover and focus states should use white opacity, rim brightness, or grayscale shadow rather than colored glow.
- Video can be dimmed or reduced in opacity to preserve grayscale contrast.
- Reduced transparency uses stronger grayscale fills.
- Reduced motion uses static poster or simplified opacity reveal.

AI summary: Strict grayscale Liquid Glass hero for premium, artistic, restrained landing pages. Uses no colored accents, HSL grayscale tokens, white opacity text hierarchy, pseudo-element glass rim, video atmosphere, serif accent typography, and single accent punctuation instead of full-line gradients.

content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: strict grayscale hero, minimal cinematic brand page, luxury AI product, art and creative platform, high-end editorial landing page, restrained Liquid Glass video hero
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Check contrast after grayscale opacity and backdrop-filter are composited.
- Do not rely on subtle opacity alone for focus-visible states.
- Preserve keyboard focus rings using grayscale high contrast.
- Do not make body copy too faint on dark video.
- Provide fallback fills when backdrop-filter is unsupported.

AI summary: Strict grayscale Liquid Glass hero for premium, artistic, restrained landing pages. Uses no colored accents, HSL grayscale tokens, white opacity text hierarchy, pseudo-element glass rim, video atmosphere, serif accent typography, and single accent punctuation instead of full-line gradients.

content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: strict grayscale hero, minimal cinematic brand page, luxury AI product, art and creative platform, high-end editorial landing page, restrained Liquid Glass video hero
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Use white opacity hierarchy: primary text-white, secondary text-white/80, body text-white/60, muted text-white/50.
- Use HSL grayscale tokens, for example hsl(0 0% X%).
- Use pseudo-element gradient rim for premium glass instead of only border-white/20.
- Use Source Serif 4 or Instrument Serif italic only for short emphasis, not full body text.
- Premium restraint can come from grayscale material quality and composition, not colored gradients.

AI summary: Strict grayscale Liquid Glass hero for premium, artistic, restrained landing pages. Uses no colored accents, HSL grayscale tokens, white opacity text hierarchy, pseudo-element glass rim, video atmosphere, serif accent typography, and single accent punctuation instead of full-line gradients.
